\[ \frac{8}{40} = \frac{1}{5} \]
(Partial pressure)N2
= PT × (mole fraction)N2
= 27 × \frac{1}{4}{\frac{1}{4} + \frac{1}{5}}
= 27 × \frac{1}{4}{\frac{9}{20}}
= 27 × \frac{20}{4 × 9}
= 3 × 5
= 15 bar
